user.title: Add ControlArt module
user.description: Enter the IP address of the ControlArt module (relay or dimmer). The module type is detected automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the module. Check the IP address, the port and the network.
error.unexpected_response: The device replied with an unexpected message. Make sure the IP address points to a ControlArt module.

channels.title: Channel roles
channels.description: Each motor channel (0-4) drives a pair of relays. Set whether each channel is used as two independent lights or as a single cover/motor.

lights.title: Light outputs
lights.description: Select which outputs should be exposed as lights and give them friendly names.

covers.title: Covers
covers.description: Set a name and device class for each cover channel. Enable 'invert motor direction' if open and close are swapped.

keypads.title: CAN Bus keypads
keypads.description: Keypads found on the CAN Bus network are listed below. Select the ones to expose and give them names.

data.expose_inputs: Expose the 12 hardwired inputs as sensors

abort.no_covers: No channel is configured as a cover. Set a channel role to 'cover' first.
abort.no_keypads: No CAN Bus keypad was found or is configured.

calibrate.name: Calibrate cover
calibrate.description: Runs a calibration step for a ControlArt cover/blind.

set_motor_mode.name: Set motor mode
set_motor_mode.description: Changes the operating mode of a ControlArt cover motor.
